title: Willkommen bei STADS Education
text:
Wir bei STADS glauben, dass Coding und Datenanalyse die Schlüsselkompetenzen der Zukunft sind. In Zusammenarbeit mit der Universität Mannheim bieten wir Studierenden aller Fachrichtungen die Möglichkeit, diese Skills praxisnah zu erlernen.




Unser Flaggschiff-Kurs. Lerne Python von Grund auf – perfekt für Data Analytics. Zu den Kursinfos



Nutze die Power von KI-Tools und LLMs, um effizienter zu programmieren. Mehr erfahren

title: Willkommen bei STADS Education
text:
🛠️ Unser Standard-Setup
Egal welchen Kurs du besuchst, wir arbeiten mit industrieweiten Standards. Bereite deinen Laptop vor:

Python 3.13: Die Basis für alles.
VS Code: Unser bevorzugter Editor für Jupyter Notebooks.
Git: Für die Versionsverwaltung deiner Projekte.







NoteUnterstützung gesucht?



Komm zu unseren Q&A Sessions oder schreib uns bei Fragen zum Setup!



Kontakt: Schreib uns

title: STADS Education
text:
Current Course Portfolio




🐍 Python Fundamentals
Master the world’s most popular language for data science. View Course Details


🤖 AI & Vibecoding
Learn to build software at the speed of thought. View Course Details







Our Mission


Empowering Every Student
At STADS, we believe that data literacy is the universal language of the 21st century. In an era defined by information, the ability to understand, interpret, and leverage data is no longer just a technical skill—it is a fundamental requirement for leadership and innovation across all disciplines. Our mission is to provide students from all academic backgrounds, from the humanities to the natural sciences, with the practical programming and analytical skills needed to thrive in an increasingly data-driven world.



Bridging the Gap
We recognize the growing divide between academic theory and industry demands. While universities provide the conceptual foundation, the fast-paced world of technology requires hands-on agility. STADS Education serves as the vital bridge, translating complex statistical concepts into executable code. By focusing on modern tools like Python, Version Control with Git, and the integration of Artificial Intelligence, we ensure that our participants are not just observers of the digital transformation, but active architects of it.



Peer-to-Peer Excellence
What sets us apart is our community-driven approach. We are students teaching students. This unique dynamic fosters a low-barrier learning environment where questions are encouraged and complex topics are deconstructed into relatable insights. Through our structured curriculum and interactive sessions, we transform theoretical knowledge into actionable expertise, preparing the next generation of Mannheim graduates to lead with confidence in a globalized, tech-centric economy.



A Future-Proof Mindset
Beyond syntax and algorithms, we cultivate a mindset of continuous growth. In the age of “Vibecoding” and generative AI, the tools will change, but the logic of data remains constant. We empower our members to stay curious, adapt to new workflows, and maintain the high ethical standards required when handling the data that shapes our society. Join us in building a future where everyone has the power to turn raw data into meaningful impact.





Technical Requirements

🐍 Python🖥️ IDE🌿 Git


We recommend installing Python 3.13.


We use Visual Studio Code.


Git is essential for collaboration.
